label: default agent • update a schedule's time
query: Change my schedule 9b4f2a61-7d05-4c38-8e1a-0f6c3d9b27e5 to run at 07:00 instead.
notes: action 'update' with id (+ a daily time patch). Unknown id → typed not-found error (no mutation). The selection assertion pins the 'update' action (not the literal UUID — small models mis-transcribe ids), distinguishing a patch from create.
